cycle_1.basis: First formal proposal per Rule 3 after the selective August 10 confirmatory round.

initiation_judgment.basis: Medivation was already reviewing strategic alternatives with advisors, but unsolicited third-party interest, led by Sanofi, turned that standing review into a live sale process.
initiation_judgment.source_text: The alternatives reviewed have included large and small acquisitions, mergers and a sale of Medivation, and, from time to time, Medivation has received inquiries from third parties seeking to determine Medivation's interest in a sale transaction.

advisor_jp_morgan.source_text: J. P. Morgan Securities LLC ("J. P. Morgan"), retained as independent financial advisor to Medivation

advisor_evercore.source_text: Evercore Group L. L. C. ("Evercore") as an additional independent financial advisor to Medivation

advisor_wachtell_lipton.source_text: Wachtell, Lipton, Rosen & Katz ("Wachtell Lipton"), which Medivation had retained as an additional legal advisor

advisor_richards_layton_finger.source_text: Richards, Layton & Finger, P. A., Medivation's Delaware counsel

advisor_weil_gotshal.source_text: Weil Gotshal & Manges LLP ("Weil Gotshal"), Sanofi's legal counsel
